def positive_insecure_hash_algorithm_used_for_security_sensitive_purpose():
    rule_id = "insecure_hash_algorithm_used_for_security_sensitive_purpose"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "MD5 or SHA-1 used for password hashing, token generation, or a security-sensitive digest."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
